title: Bullet visual style priority (gun -> plugin -> onVisualTick) + ON_VISUAL_TICK trait hook

acceptance_criteria: VisualStyleResolver: server-side resolution of final bullet visual style from gun definition bullet_style -> installed plugin bullet_style overrides (whole-cover semantics, high priority covers low, same priority install-order) -> result is style ID for BulletS2CPacket
Plugin bullet_style override is whole-cover (not field-level merge): high-priority plugin's bullet_style fully replaces lower-priority's, no field mixing
Plugins without bullet_style declaration do not participate in override chain
TraitHookType.ON_VISUAL_TICK enum constant added to trait hook type registry
onVisualTick hook: client-only, called per-frame before rendering each BulletRenderObject, receives BulletRecord + BulletSnapshot + BulletRenderObject
Hook can modify BulletRenderObject: setTexture, setScale, setRenderMode (runtime visual changes)
Hook dispatch integrated into BulletRenderDispatcher render loop (before each bullet is rendered)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/trait/TraitHookType.java (add ON_VISUAL_TICK constant, if not exists from M3)
